# Test assets

`codicon-subset.woff2.b64` contains a one-glyph WOFF2 subset of Microsoft's
[vscode-codicons](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-codicons), modified by
subsetting the original Codicon font. It is used only to verify standalone
local-font inlining and is licensed under
[CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
